# YeboID Developer Documentation

> Phone-first identity for African apps — SDK reference, integration guides, and API documentation.

This is the developer documentation for YeboID, the shared identity layer for African apps. It covers SDK installation for Flutter, Node, and the web; OAuth/OIDC integration; phone-OTP and PIN flows; legacy-user linking; and the full HTTP API reference.

YeboID is part of the Omevision family of African-built tech products, headquartered in Mbabane, Eswatini. Category: Identity / Authentication / Developer Documentation.

## What you'll find here

- Quickstart guides for Flutter, Node.js, and JavaScript/TypeScript web apps
- OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect integration with PKCE
- Phone-number authentication with OTP via SMS and WhatsApp
- PIN-based step-up authentication
- Legacy-user linking (migrating existing users to YeboID without re-registration)
- HTTP API reference, error codes, and webhooks
- Production checklists and security best practices

## Who it is for

Developers and product teams adding YeboID authentication to consumer or B2B apps targeting African users.

## Links

- [YeboID developer docs (this site)](https://docs.yeboid.com): SDK reference and integration guides.
- [YeboID (main site)](https://yeboid.com): the product homepage and signup.
- [Omevision (parent company)](https://omevision.com): the African tech group behind YeboID.

## About this file

This file follows the [llms.txt convention](https://llmstxt.org/) — it is a curated, machine-readable summary of the YeboID developer documentation intended for use by LLMs and AI agents. Last generated: 2026-05-10.
